## Type of change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (Windows schedule flakiness excepted)
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated for notable changes (if applicable)
